name: prod-master-01
host: <生产环境 IP 或主机名>
whitelist: ^kubectl get .*,^kubectl describe .*,^kubectl logs .*,^kubectl top .*,^kubectl cluster-info.*,^kubectl api-resources.*,^kubectl explain .*,^kubectl rollout status.*,^helm list.*,^helm status.*,^helm history.*,^cat .*,^df.*,^free.*,^uptime.*,^top -b.*,^ps aux.*,^netstat.*,^ss.*,^systemctl status.*,^journalctl.*

name: prod-master-01-root
host: <生产环境 IP 或主机名>
whitelist: ^kubectl get .*,^kubectl describe .*,^kubectl logs .*,^kubectl top .*,^kubectl cluster-info.*,^kubectl api-resources.*,^kubectl explain .*,^kubectl rollout restart .*,^kubectl rollout status.*,^helm list.*,^helm status.*,^helm history.*,^cat .*,^df.*,^free.*,^uptime.*,^top -b.*,^ps aux.*,^netstat.*,^ss.*,^systemctl status.*,^systemctl restart .*,^journalctl.*
